resources.string: Controls how animations behave across the app
A production-grade animation library\nfor Compose Multiplatform.
Bounce, Spring, Flip, Material Motion and more
All built-in presets with interactive demos
Categorized interactive examples — fade, scale, spring, attention seekers & more
Complete documentation of every Modifier, Composable, data class, and namespace effect
Getting started guide, Atomic Design concepts, and interactive playground
Browse, compare, and tune every built-in animation
Production-ready animations for Compose Multiplatform.\nMake your UI speak through motion.
Add one dependency, wrap your app, animate anything.
Animations organized into Atoms, Molecules, and Organisms.
Three steps to your first animation
What we believe about animation and why canimation exists
Animation is not decoration — it is communication. Every transition, every entrance, every emphasis tells the user something: where they came from, where they\'re going, and what matters right now.
canimation was born from the conviction that great animation should be as easy to add as a color or a font, not a week-long engineering project.

The result is a library where a single line — Modifier.canimation(visible, Canimation.Fade.Up) — gives you production-quality motion that respects accessibility settings, adapts to platform conventions, and composes naturally with other effects via the + operator.
The values that shape every API decision
Instead of massive parameter lists, combine small focused effects with +. CanimationEffect.fade() + CanimationEffect.slideUp() is more expressive than any config object.
Every animation respects CanimationPolicy. When the OS says \'reduce motion\', we listen automatically. No extra code. No opt-in.
Start with Modifier.canimation(visible, Canimation.Fade.Up). Need more? Use CanimationEffect primitives. Need full control? Drop to CanimationSpec.
This entire documentation site is built with canimation — every card entrance, every demo uses the same API you\'ll use in your app.
Standing on the shoulders of giants
canimation didn\'t emerge in a vacuum. We carefully studied the animation ecosystem across web, mobile, and design systems.
The composable, declarative API pattern. Our CanimationEffect + operator and the Canimation.* namespace are directly inspired by this philosophy.
The power of named presets. Our 100+ CanimationPreset entries follow this exact pattern — one line, done.
Compositional CSS animation utilities with multi-axis control. Influenced our enter/exit distinction and multi-axis composition.
Meaningful transitions with container transform and shared axis. Our Material.* namespace comes directly from Material Motion.
More than just another animation library
Built from the ground up for Compose\'s graphicsLayer, state-driven rendering, and recomposition model.
One API, five targets. Android, iOS, Desktop, Web (JS), Web (WasmJs).
The + operator composes effects predictably: properties from the right override the left, duration takes the maximum.
Organized as Atoms (Fade.In), Molecules (Fade.Up), Organisms (Entrance.Drop). Pick the complexity level you need.
CanimationProvider + CanimationPolicy means accessibility is the default behavior.
canimation aims to be the definitive animation toolkit for Compose Multiplatform.
100+ animation effects across 13 categories (Atoms, Molecules, Organisms)
Atomic Design organization: Fade, Scale, Slide, Rotate, Bounce, Spring, Flip, Zoom, Attention, Entrance, Material, Morph
Five-platform support: Android, iOS, Desktop, Web JS, Web WasmJs
Layout animations — shared element transitions and container transforms
Gesture-driven animations — spring-based drag, swipe, and fling
Scroll-linked animations — parallax, reveal, and pinning
Stagger orchestration — automatic stagger for list items
Visual animation editor — design animations graphically, export as code
AI-assisted motion — suggest appropriate animations based on context
Design system integration — Material 3, iOS HIG, and custom token presets
Breaking News: Jetpack Compose is awesome!
This library made our app feel alive. The API is incredibly intuitive.
Zoom in from left at light speed
Zoom in from right at light speed
Fade in combined with pop scale
Enter fading up, exit fading down
Enter with pop, exit with shrink
Enter sliding left, exit sliding right
Enter zooming in, exit zooming out
Enter with drop, exit with collapse
Random characters resolve into target text
Letters oscillate in a wave pattern
Text splits and reveals with staggered animation
Digital glitch distortion effect on text
Digits roll like a slot machine
Underline draws beneath text on appear
Text reveals with a sliding mask
Text lines reveal one at a time
Characters delete one by one in reverse
Card animations, flips, and surface effects
3D card flip between front and back
Card tilts toward pointer on hover
Animated border traces around the card
Card elevates with shadow on hover
Parallax layers tilt with pointer movement
Frosted glass card with blur effect
Content reveals with a wipe transition
Cards fan out from a stack
Card snaps to position with magnetic feel
Swipeable card stack like a dating app
Dots pulse in sequence to indicate loading
Liquid-style fill animation in a circle
Progress bar with glowing edge effect
Progress indicator that morphs between shapes
Number animates up to target value
Tab bar with animated selection indicator
Large dropdown menu with reveal animation
Tab indicator slides smoothly between tabs
Menu items arranged in a circle with animation
Side drawer with elastic spring animation
Header hides/shows based on scroll direction
Search bar expands from icon on tap
Animated checkbox with check mark draw
Animated toggle switch with spring physics
Button attracted to pointer with magnetic effect
Button with material ripple on tap
Chip component with spring selection animation
Burst of confetti particles on trigger
Content reveals with a sliding mask
List items enter with spring bounce
Chain of elements connected by springs
Pie chart with animated segment reveals
Bar chart with animated bar growth
List that loads more items on scroll
Image zooms to hero view on tap
Waveforms, visual effects, and animated graphics
Interactive buttons, cards, indicators, and controls
Card that can be swiped away
Simple slot machine with rolling numbers
Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.In + Canimation.Scale.Pop, )
Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Up + Canimation.Rotate.In, )
Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Zoom.In + Canimation.Slide.Up, )
Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Bounce.In + Canimation.Fade.In, )
Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Spring.Pop + Canimation.Rotate.Clockwise, )
Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Entrance.Elevate + Canimation.Fade.Gentle, )
Modifier.canimationTransition( visible = isVisible, enter = Canimation.Fade.Up, exit = Canimation.Fade.Down, )
Modifier.canimationTransition( visible = isVisible, enter = Canimation.Scale.Pop, exit = Canimation.Scale.Shrink, )
Modifier.canimationTransition( visible = isVisible, enter = Canimation.Slide.Left, exit = Canimation.Slide.Right, )
Modifier.canimationTransition( visible = isVisible, enter = Canimation.Zoom.In, exit = Canimation.Zoom.Out, )
Modifier.canimationTransition( visible = isVisible, enter = Canimation.Entrance.Drop, exit = Canimation.Morph.Collapse, )
Modifier.canimationTransition( visible = isVisible, enter = Canimation.Material.SharedAxisX, exit = Canimation.Material.SharedAxisX, )
items.forEachIndexed { i, item -> delay(i * Canimation.Stagger.Normal.toLong()) Modifier.canimation( visible = true, effect = Canimation.Fade.Up, ) }
items.forEachIndexed { i, item -> delay(i * Canimation.Stagger.Quick.toLong()) Modifier.canimation( visible = true, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ) }
items.forEachIndexed { i, item -> delay(i * Canimation.Stagger.Slow.toLong()) Modifier.canimation( visible = true, effect = Canimation.Slide.Right, ) }
items.forEachIndexed { i, item -> delay(i * Canimation.Stagger.Relaxed.toLong()) Modifier.canimation( visible = true, effect = Canimation.Bounce.In, ) }
items.forEachIndexed { i, item -> delay(i * Canimation.Stagger.Normal.toLong()) Modifier.canimation( visible = true, effect = Canimation.Spring.Up, ) }
Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Up + Canimation.Scale.Subtle, )
Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Slide.Right + Canimation.Fade.In, )
Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop + Canimation.Fade.In, )
Modifier.canimationTransition( visible = isVisible, enter = Canimation.Material.FadeThrough, exit = Canimation.Material.FadeThrough, )
ScrambleText( targetText = "Hello, World!", scrambleDuration = 1200, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
AnimatedUnderlineText( text = stringResource(Res.string.demo_hover_me), underlineColor = Color.Blue, modifier = Modifier.padding(8.dp), )
AnimatedGradientText( text = stringResource(Res.string.demo_shimmering_label), colors = listOf(Color.Red, Color.Yellow, Color.Green), modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
RevealTextEffect( text = stringResource(Res.string.demo_revealed), revealDuration = 1000, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
TextLineReveal( lines = listOf("Line one", "Line two", "Line three"), delayPerLine = 200L, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
FlipCard( frontText = "Product Name", backText = "Product Details", modifier = Modifier.size(200.dp), )
TiltCard( content = { Text("Tilt Me") }, maxTiltDegrees = 15f, modifier = Modifier.size(200.dp), )
CardBorderTrace( borderColor = Color.Cyan, traceDuration = 2000, modifier = Modifier.size(200.dp), )
CardGradientBorder( colors = listOf(Color.Magenta, Color.Cyan), borderWidth = 2.dp, modifier = Modifier.size(180.dp), )
CardExpandCollapse( title = Res.string.examples_data_cards_surfaces_item_06_title_2, expandedContent = { Text("Expanded details here") }, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
CardGlassmorphism( blurRadius = 20.dp, tintColor = Color.White.copy(alpha = 0.2f), modifier = Modifier.size(200.dp), )
CardRevealWipe( revealDirection = RevealDirection.Left, duration = 800, modifier = Modifier.size(200.dp), )
CardStackSwipe( onSwipe = { direction -> /* handle */ }, modifier = Modifier .fillMaxWidth() .height(300.dp), )
PulseLoadingDots( dotCount = 3, dotSize = 12.dp, color = Color.Blue, modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp), )
ProgressRing( progress = 0.75f, strokeWidth = 8.dp, color = Color.Green, modifier = Modifier.size(64.dp), )
LiquidFill( fillPercent = 0.6f, liquidColor = Color.Blue, modifier = Modifier.size(120.dp), )
GlowProgressBar( progress = 0.8f, glowColor = Color.Cyan, modifier = Modifier .fillMaxWidth() .height(8.dp), )
MorphProgressIndicator( progress = 0.5f, shape = MorphShape.Circle, modifier = Modifier.size(60.dp), )
ProgressScrubber( progress = 0.4f, onProgressChange = { newVal -> /* update */ }, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
AnimatedCounter( targetValue = 1234, label = "Total Users", modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp), )
EngagementStats( likes = 1200, comments = 340, shares = 89, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
AnimatedTabs( tabs = listOf("Home", "Search", "Profile"), selectedIndex = 0, onTabSelected = { index -> /* navigate */ }, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
MegaMenuReveal( menuItems = listOf("Products", "Services", "About"), revealDuration = 400, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
SmoothTabIndicator( tabs = listOf("All", "Active", "Archived"), selectedIndex = 0, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
CircularMenu( items = listOf("Share", "Edit", "Delete"), radius = 80.dp, modifier = Modifier.size(200.dp), )
ScrollDirectionHeader( title = Res.string.examples_data_navigation_layout_item_06_title_2, collapseOnScroll = true, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
HoldToConfirm( text = stringResource(Res.string.demo_hold_to_delete), holdDuration = 2000L, onConfirmed = { /* delete item */ }, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
SwipeActions( onSwipeLeft = { /* archive */ }, onSwipeRight = { /* delete */ }, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
MultiStateBadge( state = BadgeState.New, text = stringResource(Res.string.demo_3_new), modifier = Modifier.padding(4.dp), )
ElasticPull( onRefresh = { /* reload data */ }, elasticity = 0.5f, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(), )
ExpandingSearch( placeholder = "Search...", onSearch = { query -> /* filter */ }, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
IOSSlider( value = 0.5f, onValueChange = { newVal -> /* update */ }, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
CheckboxAnimation( checked = true, onCheckedChange = { isChecked -> /* update */ }, modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp), )
SwitchAnimation( checked = false, onCheckedChange = { isOn -> /* toggle */ }, modifier = Modifier.padding(8.dp), )
MagneticButton( text = stringResource(Res.string.demo_hover_me), magneticRadius = 40.dp, onClick = { /* action */ }, modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp), )
RippleButton( text = stringResource(Res.string.demo_tap_me), rippleColor = Color.White, onClick = { /* action */ }, modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp), )
SpringChip( label = "Selected", selected = true, onClick = { /* toggle */ }, modifier = Modifier.padding(4.dp), )
ToastNotification( message = "Item saved successfully!", duration = 3000L, modifier = Modifier .fillMaxWidth() .padding(16.dp), )
CoinFlip( frontContent = { Text("Heads") }, backContent = { Text("Tails") }, modifier = Modifier.size(100.dp), )
ColorMorph( colors = listOf(Color.Red, Color.Blue, Color.Green), duration = 3000, modifier = Modifier.size(150.dp), )
GradientShift( colors = listOf(Color.Magenta, Color.Cyan), shiftSpeed = 2000, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
PathTracer( pathColor = Color.Cyan, strokeWidth = 3.dp, modifier = Modifier.size(200.dp), )
ConfettiExplosion( particleCount = 100, colors = listOf(Color.Red, Color.Yellow, Color.Blue), modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(), )
WaveEffect( waveColor = Color.Blue, amplitude = 20f, frequency = 2f, modifier = Modifier .fillMaxWidth() .height(100.dp), )
SlidingReveal( direction = RevealDirection.Left, duration = 800, modifier = Modifier .fillMaxWidth() .height(200.dp), )
FocusBlurEffect( blurRadius = 10.dp, focusArea = FocusArea.Center, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(), )
FloatingParticles( particleCount = 30, particleColor = Color.White, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(), )
PulsingAvatar( imageSize = 64.dp, pulseColor = Color.Green, modifier = Modifier.size(80.dp), )
PulseRadar( radarColor = Color.Green, pulseCount = 3, modifier = Modifier.size(200.dp), )
HeartbeatLine( lineColor = Color.Red, strokeWidth = 2.dp, modifier = Modifier .fillMaxWidth() .height(60.dp), )
BouncySpringList( items = listOf("Item 1", "Item 2", "Item 3"), stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
SpringChain( nodeCount = 5, stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
SlinkySpring( coilCount = 8, springColor = Color.Gray, modifier = Modifier .fillMaxWidth() .height(150.dp), )
AnimatedPieChart( data = listOf(30f, 25f, 20f, 15f, 10f), colors = listOf(Color.Red, Color.Blue, Color.Green, Color.Yellow, Color.Cyan), modifier = Modifier.size(200.dp), )
AnimatedBarChart( data = listOf(80f, 45f, 90f, 60f, 75f), barColor = Color.Blue, modifier = Modifier .fillMaxWidth() .height(200.dp), )
InfiniteLoadingList( onLoadMore = { /* fetch next page */ }, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(), )
WaveformVisualizer( barCount = 20, barColor = Color.Cyan, modifier = Modifier .fillMaxWidth() .height(100.dp), )
MatrixRain( columnCount = 15, rainColor = Color.Green, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(), )
MusicEqualizer( barCount = 5, barColor = Color.Magenta, modifier = Modifier .fillMaxWidth() .height(60.dp), )
WaterDroplet( dropColor = Color.Cyan, rippleRadius = 40.dp, modifier = Modifier.size(120.dp), )
PulseButton( text = stringResource(Res.string.demo_tap_me), pulseColor = Color.Blue, onClick = { /* action */ }, modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp), )
NeumorphismCard( shadowColor = Color.Gray, elevation = 8.dp, modifier = Modifier.size(200.dp), )
GradientBorderCard( colors = listOf(Color.Magenta, Color.Cyan), borderWidth = 2.dp, modifier = Modifier.size(200.dp), )
StackedNotifications( notifications = listOf("New message", "Update available"), maxVisible = 3, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), )
SwipeCard( onSwipeLeft = { /* dismiss */ }, onSwipeRight = { /* accept */ }, modifier = Modifier .fillMaxWidth() .height(200.dp), )
AnimatedCheckmark( checked = true, checkColor = Color.Green, modifier = Modifier.size(48.dp), )
RadialProgress( progress = 0.7f, strokeWidth = 6.dp, color = Color.Blue, modifier = Modifier.size(80.dp), )

This animation uses Modifier.canimation() to animate element properties between hidden and visible states. When visible becomes true, the element transitions from the initial effect values (offset, alpha, scale, rotation) to their default state using an easing curve. The animation is GPU-accelerated through graphicsLayer.

This uses Modifier.canimationTransition() with separate enter and exit effects. The enter effect plays when visible becomes true, and the exit effect (reversed) plays when visible becomes false. This allows asymmetric transitions, for example sliding in from the left but fading out.

Effects are combined using the + operator. When two CanimationEffect objects are combined, the right-hand side fills in any null values from the left-hand side. This lets you compose complex multi-property animations from simple building blocks: Canimation.Fade.Up + Canimation.Rotate.In creates a fade-up with rotation.

Stagger patterns apply the same animation to multiple elements with increasing delays. Each item receives a delay of index × staggerMs, creating a cascading wave effect. Use Canimation.Stagger constants (Fast=60ms, Normal=80ms, Slow=120ms) to control timing.

Modifier.canimationEmphasize() creates attention-seeking animations triggered by a boolean state. Unlike enter/exit animations, emphasis effects play while the element is already visible: pulse, shake, bounce, and more. Useful for form validation feedback, notification badges, or interactive highlights.

This is a rich animated component that uses Modifier.canimation() for its entry animation, combined with internal Compose animation APIs for its unique behavior. The entry animation ensures smooth appearance using the canimation system, while custom animations handle the component\'s specific interaction pattern.
This animation demonstrates the canimation library\'s approach to declarative animations in Compose Multiplatform. Apply effects through Modifier extensions for a clean, composable API.

To use this animation in your project: 1. Add the canimation-core dependency 2. Create a boolean state for visibility 3. Apply Modifier.canimation() to your composable 4. Toggle the visibility state to trigger the animation
Category: %1$s.
The animation respects CanimationProvider policy. Wrap your app in CanimationProvider to globally control animation behavior (SystemAware, AlwaysFull, AlwaysReduced, AlwaysOff).

To use asymmetric transitions: 1. Define separate enter and exit CanimationEffect instances 2. Apply Modifier.canimationTransition(visible, enter, exit) 3. The enter effect plays forward when visible=true 4. The exit effect plays in reverse when visible=false
Combine with CanimationVisibility for composable-level enter/exit.

To compose effects: 1. Combine effects with the + operator: effectA + effectB 2. The right-hand side overrides non-null values of the left 3. Use this to create complex animations from simple primitives 4. Example: Canimation.Fade.Up + Canimation.Scale.Pop

This component uses canimation for entry animation: 1. Import the component from the examples package 2. The component handles its own internal animation logic 3. Entry animation is powered by Modifier.canimation() 4. Wrap in CanimationProvider to control animation policy

Category: %1$s.
Add canimation-core to your dependencies and apply the appropriate Modifier extension. All animations work cross-platform on Android, iOS, Desktop, and Web (JS/WASM).
AnimatedBreadcrumb(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Up, ))
AnimatedNavItem(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Drop.Light, ))
AnimatedTimeline(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Rise.In, ))
AnimatedStatCard(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Tilt.Swing, ))
AnimatedKpi(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Rise.Scale, ))
AnimatedRating(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ))
AnimatedTagCloud(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Float.ScaleUp, ))
ColorSwatchPicker(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Elastic.Snap, ))
AnimatedChipGroup(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Gentle, ))
AnimatedPricingToggle(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Shrink.Subtle, ))
PulseRing(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Expand, ))
WaveProgressBar(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Wave.Gentle, ))
StackedAvatars(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Diagonal.Subtle, ))
AnimatedCodeBlock(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Slide.LeftSubtle, ))
AnimatedListItem(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Tilt.Left, ))
AnimatedFeatureGrid(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Diagonal.BottomRight, ))
AnimatedSearchResult(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Float.Gentle, ))
TextFadeReveal(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Up, ))
TextHighlighter(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Reveal.Left, ))
TextShuffleWord(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Gentle, ))
TextGradientReveal(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Slide.RightSubtle, ))
TextRotateWords(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Rotate.In, ))
ProfileCard(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ))
PricingCard(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Rise.In, ))
NotificationCard(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Slide.DownSubtle, ))
TestimonialCard(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Gentle, ))
MetricCard(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Tilt.Swing, ))
ProductCard(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Float.Up, ))
SideMenuReveal(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Slide.LeftSubtle, ))
PaginationDots(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ))
CommandPalette(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Down, ))
MiniBarChart(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Rise.In, ))
DonutChart(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Rotate.In, ))
SparkLine(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Slide.RightSubtle, ))
DataTable(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Up, ))
AnimatedBanner(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Slide.DownSubtle, ))
AnimatedTooltip(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Float.Up, ))
AnimatedAlert(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Slide.LeftSubtle, ))
AnimatedDropdown(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Up, ))
AnimatedProgressCard(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ))
AnimatedDialog(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ))
OrbitDots(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Rotate.In, ))
BouncingLoader(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Bounce.In, ))
GlowPulse(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ))
WaveformBars(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Wave.Gentle, ))
LikeButton(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Spring.PopIn, ))
QuantitySelector(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ))
RadioSelector(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Gentle, ))
SliderControl(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Slide.RightSubtle, ))
AnimatedPasswordField(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Micro.NudgeUp, ))
AnimatedFileUpload(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Float.Gentle, ))
AnimatedVote(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ))
AnimatedSearchBar(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Stretch.Horizontal, ))
AnimatedFormValidation(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Micro.NudgeUp, ))
AnimatedBottomSheet(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Slide.Up, ))
AnimatedSnackbar(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Slide.Up, ))
AnimatedFab(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ))
AnimatedChipInput(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ))
AnimatedAccordion(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Up, ))
AnimatedStepper(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Slide.RightSubtle, ))
MorphingShape(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Rotate.In, ))
SpiralDots(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Rotate.In, ))
DnaHelixCanvas(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Wave.Gentle, ))
HexGrid(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Gentle, ))
ParticleField(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Float.Gentle, ))
RotatingSquares(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Rotate.In, ))
SegmentedControl(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Gentle, ))
AnimatedSwitch(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Spring.PopIn, ))
AnimatedPinInput(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ))
AnimatedColorPicker(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Spring.PopIn, ))
AnimatedNotificationBell(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Attention.Swing, ))
AnimatedCountdownTimer(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ))
AnimatedCreditCard(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Flip.Horizontal, ))
AnimatedThemeToggle(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Rotate.In, ))
TypewriterEffect(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Gentle, ))
TextMorph(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Up, ))
TextStrikethrough(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ))
TextGlitch(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Glitch.Subtle, ))
RecipeCard(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Rise.In, ))
WeatherCard(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Fade.Gentle, ))
EventCard(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Slide.LeftSubtle, ))
MusicPlayerCard(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Float.Up, ))
BottomNavBar(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Spring.PopIn, ))
RadarChart(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop, ))
HorizontalBarChart(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Slide.RightSubtle, ))
GaugeChart(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Rotate.In, ))
LiveCounter(modifier = Modifier.canimation( visible = isVisible, effect = Canimation.Micro.NudgeUp, ))
Install with Gradle and add to your project.
This library made our app feel alive. The API is incredibly intuitive.

fun Modifier.canimation(
 visible: Boolean,
 effect: CanimationEffect,
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationTransition(
 visible: Boolean,
 enter: CanimationEffect,
 exit: CanimationEffect? = null,
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationEnter(
 visible: Boolean,
 preset: CanimationPreset = CanimationPreset.FadeUp,
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationEnter(
 visible: Boolean,
 fullSpec: CanimationSpec,
 reducedSpec: CanimationSpec = fullSpec.toReduced(),
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationExit(
 visible: Boolean,
 preset: CanimationPreset = CanimationPreset.FadeUp,
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationExit(
 visible: Boolean,
 fullSpec: CanimationSpec,
 reducedSpec: CanimationSpec = fullSpec.toReduced(),
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationTransition(
 visible: Boolean,
 enterPreset: CanimationPreset = CanimationPreset.FadeUp,
 exitPreset: CanimationPreset = enterPreset,
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationTransition(
 visible: Boolean,
 enterFullSpec: CanimationSpec,
 enterReducedSpec: CanimationSpec,
 exitFullSpec: CanimationSpec,
 exitReducedSpec: CanimationSpec,
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationEmphasize(
 active: Boolean,
 preset: CanimationPreset = CanimationPreset.ScaleIn,
): Modifier

@Composable
fun CanimationVisibility(
 visible: Boolean,
 enterPreset: CanimationPreset = CanimationPreset.FadeUp,
 exitPreset: CanimationPreset = enterPreset,
 content: @Composable () -> Unit,
)

@Composable
fun CanimationVisibility(
 visible: Boolean,
 enterFullSpec: CanimationSpec,
 enterReducedSpec: CanimationSpec = enterFullSpec.toReduced(),
 exitFullSpec: CanimationSpec = enterFullSpec.reversed(),
 exitReducedSpec: CanimationSpec = enterReducedSpec.reversed(),
 content: @Composable () -> Unit,
)

@Composable
fun CanimationProvider(
 tokens: CanimationTokens = CanimationTokens.Default,
 policy: CanimationPolicy = CanimationPolicy.SystemAware,
 presetRegistry: PresetRegistry = PresetRegistry.Default,
 systemReducedMotion: Boolean? = null,
 content: @Composable () -> Unit,
)

data class CanimationEffect(
 val alpha: CanimationRange? = null,
 val offsetX: CanimationDpRange? = null,
 val offsetY: CanimationDpRange? = null,
 val scale: CanimationRange? = null,
 val rotation: CanimationRange? = null,
 val durationMs: Int = 220,
 val easing: Easing? = null,
)

data class CanimationSpec(
 val durationMs: Int,
 val easing: Easing,
 val alpha: CanimationRange? = null,
 val offsetX: CanimationDpRange? = null,
 val offsetY: CanimationDpRange? = null,
 val scale: CanimationRange? = null,
 val rotation: CanimationRange? = null,
)

data class CanimationPresetSpec(
 val fullEnter: CanimationSpec,
 val fullExit: CanimationSpec,
 val reducedEnter: CanimationSpec,
 val reducedExit: CanimationSpec,
)

data class CanimationRange(
 val from: Float,
 val to: Float,
)

data class CanimationDpRange(
 val from: Dp,
 val to: Dp,
)

data class CanimationContext(
 val tokens: CanimationTokens,
 val level: CanimationLevel,
 val presetRegistry: PresetRegistry,
 val timeSourceMillis: () -> Long,
)

data class CanimationTokens(
 val duration: DurationTokens,
 val easing: EasingTokens,
 val distance: DistanceTokens,
 val spring: SpringTokens,
)
enum class CanimationLevel { Full, Reduced, Off }

fun rotate(
 fromDegrees: Float = -15f,
 toDegrees: Float = 0f,
): CanimationEffect
Primary API. Apply enter/exit animations using composable CanimationEffect objects. Effects can be combined with the + operator. Respects CanimationProvider policy (Full / Reduced / Off).
Asymmetric enter/exit transitions using CanimationEffect. If exit is null, the enter effect is automatically reversed.
Enter-only animation using a named CanimationPreset. Ideal for lazy layouts and staggered list items.
Enter-only animation with custom CanimationSpec for full control over duration, easing, and animation properties.
Exit-only animation using a named CanimationPreset. Applies the reversed enter spec when the element exits.
Exit-only animation with custom CanimationSpec for full control.
Full enter/exit transition using named CanimationPresets. Both enter and exit can be different presets.
Most flexible transition. Define separate enter/exit specs with full/reduced motion variants for complete accessibility control.
Emphasis animation that draws attention to interactive elements. Triggers when active becomes true. Use with Pulse, Tada, Wobble, etc.
AnimatedVisibility wrapper with named presets. Wraps content that should appear/disappear with canimation transitions.
Custom-spec version of CanimationVisibility for full control over all animation directions and accessibility variants.
Scoped provider that sets the animation context for all child composables. Controls motion level (Full / Reduced / Off), tokens, and preset registry.
Composable animation effect. All properties are optional — set only what you need. Effects can be combined with + operator; the right-hand side overrides null values from the left.
Low-level animation specification with required duration and easing. Used by preset-based APIs. Has toReduced() and reversed() helpers.
Complete specification for a named preset — defines all four directions (enter/exit × full/reduced). Used internally by CanimationPreset.
A range of Float values for animatable properties (alpha, scale, rotation). from is the start value, to is the end value.
A range of Dp values for offset properties (offsetX, offsetY). from is the start offset, to is the end offset.
Runtime context providing tokens, motion level, and preset registry. Accessed via LocalCanimationContext.current inside the composition.
Design tokens for animation timing, easing curves, distances, and spring physics. Has a Default companion with sensible defaults.
112 named animation presets. Covers fade, scale, slide, bounce, rotate, zoom, flip, spring, material motion, attention seekers, and more. Each maps to a CanimationPresetSpec.
Controls motion behavior in CanimationProvider. SystemAware respects OS reduced-motion setting. AlwaysFull / AlwaysReduced / AlwaysOff override it.
Resolved motion level. Full plays all animations, Reduced uses shortened/simplified versions, Off skips animations entirely.
Indicates which direction an animation is playing. Used internally for spec resolution.
Create a fade (opacity) effect. Default transitions from transparent (0) to opaque (1).
Create a slide-up effect. Element enters from below by the given offset distance.
Create a slide-down effect. Element enters from above.
Create a slide-left effect. Element enters from the left side.
Create a slide-right effect. Element enters from the right side.
Create a scale effect. Default scales from 92% to 100%.
Create a pop effect with overshoot feel. 300ms duration. From 80% to 100% by default.
Create a rotation effect. Default rotates from -15° to 0° (counter-clockwise entry).
Create a full 360° spin effect. 400ms duration.
Create a zoom effect (scale + fade). From 50% scale to 100%. 300ms duration.
Create a bounce entry (scale 0.3 → 1 + fade). 400ms duration.
Create an effect wrapper with custom duration. Combine with + to override another effect's duration.
Create an effect wrapper with custom easing curve. Combine with + to override another effect's easing.
Modifier.canimationTransition( visible = isVisible, enter = Canimation.Fade.Up, exit = Canimation.Fade.Down, )

val spec = CanimationSpec( durationMs = 400, easing = FastOutSlowInEasing, alpha = CanimationRange(0f, 1f), offsetY = CanimationDpRange(24.dp, 0.dp), ) Modifier.canimationEnter(visible = show, fullSpec = spec)
Modifier.canimationTransition( visible = expanded, enterPreset = CanimationPreset.BounceIn, exitPreset = CanimationPreset.Fade, )

// Common presets CanimationPreset.FadeUp // Fade + slide up CanimationPreset.BounceIn // Bouncy scale entry CanimationPreset.Pulse // Scale pulse emphasis CanimationPreset.SpringIn // Spring overshoot CanimationPreset.FadeThrough // Material design crossfade

CanimationPolicy.SystemAware // Default — respects OS setting CanimationPolicy.AlwaysFull // Force full animations CanimationPolicy.AlwaysReduced // Force reduced motion CanimationPolicy.AlwaysOff // Disable all animations

Modifier.canimation(visible = true, effect = Canimation.Fade.Up) Modifier.canimation(visible = true, effect = Canimation.Scale.Pop + Canimation.Fade.In) Modifier.canimation(visible = true, effect = Canimation.Entrance.Drop)
Modifier.canimationTransition( visible = isVisible, enter = Canimation.Fade.Up, exit = Canimation.Fade.Down, )
CanimationVisibility( visible = visible, enterPreset = CanimationPreset.BounceIn, ) { Text(
Each primitive controls a single animation property. Combine with + to create complex effects.
Core engine, CanimationEffect, Modifier.canimation(), 100+ namespace effects
Animations in canimation are organized into three levels of complexity,
Single-property animation primitives — the smallest building blocks
Compose effects with the + operator. Use Canimation.* namespace.
Pulse, Tada, Wobble — draw attention to interactive elements.
Separate enter and exit effects for asymmetric transitions.
Complex multi-property effects — molecules forming patterns
Animation hierarchy inspired by Brad Frost's Atomic Design
Perfect for lazy layouts and staggered list items.
Every way to animate — pick your level of control
Modular architecture — import only what you need
Build custom animations from building blocks
All animation effects organized by category
All building blocks at a glance
%1$d API entries - Modifiers, Composables, Data Classes, Namespace effects, and more
Complex multi-property effects - molecules forming patterns
Core engine, CanimationEffect, Modifier.canimation(), 100+ namespace effects
Stagger delay constants for building delayed animation sequences. Use as delay multiplier for index-based staggering.

fun Modifier.canimation(
 visible: Boolean,
 effect: CanimationEffect,
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationTransition(
 visible: Boolean,
 enter: CanimationEffect,
 exit: CanimationEffect? = null,
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationEnter(
 visible: Boolean,
 preset: CanimationPreset = CanimationPreset.FadeUp,
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationEnter(
 visible: Boolean,
 fullSpec: CanimationSpec,
 reducedSpec: CanimationSpec = fullSpec.toReduced(),
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationExit(
 visible: Boolean,
 preset: CanimationPreset = CanimationPreset.FadeUp,
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationExit(
 visible: Boolean,
 fullSpec: CanimationSpec,
 reducedSpec: CanimationSpec = fullSpec.toReduced(),
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationTransition(
 visible: Boolean,
 enterPreset: CanimationPreset = CanimationPreset.FadeUp,
 exitPreset: CanimationPreset = enterPreset,
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationTransition(
 visible: Boolean,
 enterFullSpec: CanimationSpec,
 enterReducedSpec: CanimationSpec,
 exitFullSpec: CanimationSpec,
 exitReducedSpec: CanimationSpec,
): Modifier

fun Modifier.canimationEmphasize(
 active: Boolean,
 preset: CanimationPreset = CanimationPreset.ScaleIn,
): Modifier

@Composable
fun CanimationVisibility(
 visible: Boolean,
 enterPreset: CanimationPreset = CanimationPreset.FadeUp,
 exitPreset: CanimationPreset = enterPreset,
 content: @Composable () -> Unit,
)

@Composable
fun CanimationVisibility(
 visible: Boolean,
 enterFullSpec: CanimationSpec,
 enterReducedSpec: CanimationSpec = enterFullSpec.toReduced(),
 exitFullSpec: CanimationSpec = enterFullSpec.reversed(),
 exitReducedSpec: CanimationSpec = enterReducedSpec.reversed(),
 content: @Composable () -> Unit,
)

@Composable
fun CanimationProvider(
 tokens: CanimationTokens = CanimationTokens.Default,
 policy: CanimationPolicy = CanimationPolicy.SystemAware,
 presetRegistry: PresetRegistry = PresetRegistry.Default,
 systemReducedMotion: Boolean? = null,
 content: @Composable () -> Unit,
)

data class CanimationEffect(
 val alpha: CanimationRange? = null,
 val offsetX: CanimationDpRange? = null,
 val offsetY: CanimationDpRange? = null,
 val scale: CanimationRange? = null,
 val rotation: CanimationRange? = null,
 val durationMs: Int = 220,
 val easing: Easing? = null,
)

data class CanimationSpec(
 val durationMs: Int,
 val easing: Easing,
 val alpha: CanimationRange? = null,
 val offsetX: CanimationDpRange? = null,
 val offsetY: CanimationDpRange? = null,
 val scale: CanimationRange? = null,
 val rotation: CanimationRange? = null,
)

data class CanimationPresetSpec(
 val fullEnter: CanimationSpec,
 val fullExit: CanimationSpec,
 val reducedEnter: CanimationSpec,
 val reducedExit: CanimationSpec,
)

data class CanimationRange(
 val from: Float,
 val to: Float,
)

data class CanimationDpRange(
 val from: Dp,
 val to: Dp,
)

data class CanimationContext(
 val tokens: CanimationTokens,
 val level: CanimationLevel,
 val presetRegistry: PresetRegistry,
 val timeSourceMillis: () -> Long,
)

data class CanimationTokens(
 val duration: DurationTokens,
 val easing: EasingTokens,
 val distance: DistanceTokens,
 val spring: SpringTokens,
)
enum class CanimationLevel { Full, Reduced, Off }

fun rotate(
 fromDegrees: Float = -15f,
 toDegrees: Float = 0f,
): CanimationEffect
Primary API. Apply enter/exit animations using composable CanimationEffect objects. Effects can be combined with the + operator. Respects CanimationProvider policy (Full / Reduced / Off).
Asymmetric enter/exit transitions using CanimationEffect. If exit is null, the enter effect is automatically reversed.
Enter-only animation using a named CanimationPreset. Ideal for lazy layouts and staggered list items.
Enter-only animation with custom CanimationSpec for full control over duration, easing, and animation properties.
Exit-only animation using a named CanimationPreset. Applies the reversed enter spec when the element exits.
Exit-only animation with custom CanimationSpec for full control.
Full enter/exit transition using named CanimationPresets. Both enter and exit can be different presets.
Most flexible transition. Define separate enter/exit specs with full/reduced motion variants for complete accessibility control.
Emphasis animation that draws attention to interactive elements. Triggers when active becomes true. Use with Pulse, Tada, Wobble, etc.
AnimatedVisibility wrapper with named presets. Wraps content that should appear/disappear with canimation transitions.
Custom-spec version of CanimationVisibility for full control over all animation directions and accessibility variants.
Scoped provider that sets the animation context for all child composables. Controls motion level (Full / Reduced / Off), tokens, and preset registry.
Composable animation effect. All properties are optional — set only what you need. Effects can be combined with + operator; the right-hand side overrides null values from the left.
Low-level animation specification with required duration and easing. Used by preset-based APIs. Has toReduced() and reversed() helpers.
Complete specification for a named preset — defines all four directions (enter/exit × full/reduced). Used internally by CanimationPreset.
A range of Float values for animatable properties (alpha, scale, rotation). from is the start value, to is the end value.
A range of Dp values for offset properties (offsetX, offsetY). from is the start offset, to is the end offset.
Runtime context providing tokens, motion level, and preset registry. Accessed via LocalCanimationContext.current inside the composition.
Design tokens for animation timing, easing curves, distances, and spring physics. Has a Default companion with sensible defaults.
112 named animation presets. Covers fade, scale, slide, bounce, rotate, zoom, flip, spring, material motion, attention seekers, and more. Each maps to a CanimationPresetSpec.
Controls motion behavior in CanimationProvider. SystemAware respects OS reduced-motion setting. AlwaysFull / AlwaysReduced / AlwaysOff override it.
Resolved motion level. Full plays all animations, Reduced uses shortened/simplified versions, Off skips animations entirely.
Indicates which direction an animation is playing. Used internally for spec resolution.
Create a fade (opacity) effect. Default transitions from transparent (0) to opaque (1).
Create a slide-up effect. Element enters from below by the given offset distance.
Create a slide-down effect. Element enters from above.
Create a slide-left effect. Element enters from the left side.
Create a slide-right effect. Element enters from the right side.
Create a scale effect. Default scales from 92% to 100%.
Create a pop effect with overshoot feel. 300ms duration. From 80% to 100% by default.
Create a rotation effect. Default rotates from -15° to 0° (counter-clockwise entry).
Create a full 360° spin effect. 400ms duration.
Create a zoom effect (scale + fade). From 50% scale to 100%. 300ms duration.
Create a bounce entry (scale 0.3 → 1 + fade). 400ms duration.
Create an effect wrapper with custom duration. Combine with + to override another effect's duration.
Create an effect wrapper with custom easing curve. Combine with + to override another effect's easing.
Modifier.canimationTransition( visible = isVisible, enter = Canimation.Fade.Up, exit = Canimation.Fade.Down, )

val spec = CanimationSpec( durationMs = 400, easing = FastOutSlowInEasing, alpha = CanimationRange(0f, 1f), offsetY = CanimationDpRange(24.dp, 0.dp), ) Modifier.canimationEnter(visible = show, fullSpec = spec)
Modifier.canimationTransition( visible = expanded, enterPreset = CanimationPreset.BounceIn, exitPreset = CanimationPreset.Fade, )

// Common presets CanimationPreset.FadeUp // Fade + slide up CanimationPreset.BounceIn // Bouncy scale entry CanimationPreset.Pulse // Scale pulse emphasis CanimationPreset.SpringIn // Spring overshoot CanimationPreset.FadeThrough // Material design crossfade

CanimationPolicy.SystemAware // Default — respects OS setting CanimationPolicy.AlwaysFull // Force full animations CanimationPolicy.AlwaysReduced // Force reduced motion CanimationPolicy.AlwaysOff // Disable all animations
